inspection_area_inspections_skip_state_v.name: inspection_area_inspections_skip_state_valid
inspection_area_inspections_skip_state_v.value:
(
        "inspection_area_inspections"."is_skipped" = false and "inspection_area_inspections"."skip_reason" is null
      ) or (
        "inspection_area_inspections"."is_skipped" = true
        and "inspection_area_inspections"."source" = 'planned'
        and "inspection_area_inspections"."skip_reason" is not null
        and length(btrim("inspection_area_inspections"."skip_reason")) > 0
      )

inspections_submission_metadata_matches_.name: inspections_submission_metadata_matches_status
inspections_submission_metadata_matches_.value:
(
        "inspections"."status" = 'draft'
        and "inspections"."submitted_by_auth_user_id" is null
        and "inspections"."submitted_by_email" is null
        and "inspections"."submitted_at" is null
      ) or (
        "inspections"."status" = 'submitted'
        and "inspections"."submitted_by_auth_user_id" is not null
        and "inspections"."submitted_by_email" is not null
        and "inspections"."submitted_at" is not null
      )
